message:
chore: update beads issue tracker with expanded section 10 task graph

Refresh .beads/issues.jsonl from 65 to 97 tracked beads, reflecting the
expanded scope of section 10 implementation planning. New beads cover
donor-extraction governance, spec-first hybrid bootstrap contracts,
conformance verification, and additional integration checkpoints across
the FrankenEngine roadmap.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
